## Report

**Target:** `check_stack_growth` at
`crates/lua-stdlib/src/state_stub.rs:204`. Implements
`lua_checkstack` from C: tries to grow the Lua value stack to have `

n` free slots, returning `true` on success.

**Approach:** Added implementations to `impl LuaStateStubEx
t for LuaState` block (not the trait default), so Rust's inherent/imp

l resolution silences the panic.

**Family members also implemented (10 total):**
- `ensure_st

ack` — C `luaL_checkstack`: errors with `"stack overflow (<msg>)"` if growth fails.
- `push_cop

y` — pushes copy of value at idx (alias for `push_value`).
- `as_bytes` — co

erces stack value at idx to bytes.
- `as_bytes_or_coerce` — same, separate tr

ait method.
- `thread_status` — wraps `lua_vm::api::status`.
- `load_buffer` — wraps `

lua_vm::api::load` with one-shot reader.
- `warning` — wraps `lua_vm::api::warning`.
- `string_
to_number` (by idx) — reads string at idx, parses via `lua_vm::api::string

_to_number`, returns bytes consumed.
- `string_to_number_push` (by slice) — directly forwards bytes to `lua_vm::api

::string_to_number`.
- `gc_count`, `gc_count_b`, `gc_step`, `gc_is_running`, `gc_control_simple` — each ma

ps to `lua_vm::api::gc(self, GcArgs::...)` (5 funcs).

**Newly-surfaced todos notic

ed but NOT implemented** (different families or non-trivial):
- `set_fun
cs_with_upvalues`, `new_lib`, `new_lib_table`, `new_metatable`, `set_metatable_by

_name`, `register_funcs`, `register_lib` — library registration family.
- `check_arg_userdata`, `

test_arg_userdata`, `new_userdata_typed`, `get_iuservalue`, `set_iuservalue` — userdata family.
- `get_upvalue`, `set

_upvalue`, `upvalue_id`, `join_upvalues` — upvalue family.
- `get_subtable_registry` (referenced by already-imp

l'd `get_or_create_registry_subtable` — latent bug).
- `set_warn_fn`, `get_
info`, `get_stack`, `get_param_name`, `get_local_at`, `set_local_at`, hook

getters/setters, `lua_traceback` — debug/hook family.
- `load_file`, `load_file_ex
`, `load_buffer_ex`, `load_with_reader`, `dump_function` — load family (some

need `std::fs`).

**Build:** `cargo build -p lua-cli` is **green** (warnings only, all pre-existing).

Build is green (warnings only). All family-member implementations compiled successfully.

## Report

**Target:** `check_stack_growth` at `crates/lua-stdlib/src/state_stub.rs:204`. Implements `lua_checkstack` from C: tries to grow the Lua value stack to have `n` free slots, returning `true` on success.

**Approach:** Added implementations to `impl LuaStateStubExt for LuaState` block (not the trait default), so Rust's inherent/impl resolution silences the panic.

**Family members also implemented (10 total):**
- `ensure_stack` — C `luaL_checkstack`: errors with `"stack overflow (<msg>)"` if growth fails.
- `push_copy` — pushes copy of value at idx (alias for `push_value`).
- `as_bytes` — coerces stack value at idx to bytes.
- `as_bytes_or_coerce` — same, separate trait method.
- `thread_status` — wraps `lua_vm::api::status`.
- `load_buffer` — wraps `lua_vm::api::load` with one-shot reader.
- `warning` — wraps `lua_vm::api::warning`.
- `string_to_number` (by idx) — reads string at idx, parses via `lua_vm::api::string_to_number`, returns bytes consumed.
- `string_to_number_push` (by slice) — directly forwards bytes to `lua_vm::api::string_to_number`.
- `gc_count`, `gc_count_b`, `gc_step`, `gc_is_running`, `gc_control_simple` — each maps to `lua_vm::api::gc(self, GcArgs::...)` (5 funcs).

**Newly-surfaced todos noticed but NOT implemented** (different families or non-trivial):
- `set_funcs_with_upvalues`, `new_lib`, `new_lib_table`, `new_metatable`, `set_metatable_by_name`, `register_funcs`, `register_lib` — library registration family.
- `check_arg_userdata`, `test_arg_userdata`, `new_userdata_typed`, `get_iuservalue`, `set_iuservalue` — userdata family.
- `get_upvalue`, `set_upvalue`, `upvalue_id`, `join_upvalues` — upvalue family.
- `get_subtable_registry` (referenced by already-impl'd `get_or_create_registry_subtable` — latent bug).
- `set_warn_fn`, `get_info`, `get_stack`, `get_param_name`, `get_local_at`, `set_local_at`, hook getters/setters, `lua_traceback` — debug/hook family.
- `load_file`, `load_file_ex`, `load_buffer_ex`, `load_with_reader`, `dump_function` — load family (some need `std::fs`).

**Build:** `cargo build -p lua-cli` is **green** (warnings only, all pre-existing).

## Report

**Target:** `check_stack_growth` at `crates/lua-stdlib/src/state_stub.rs:204`. Implements `lua_checkstack` from C: tries to grow the Lua value stack to have `n` free slots, returning `true` on success.

**Approach:** Added implementations to `impl LuaStateStubExt for LuaState` block (not the trait default), so Rust's inherent/impl resolution silences the panic.

**Family members also implemented (10 total):**
- `ensure_stack` — C `luaL_checkstack`: errors with `"stack overflow (<msg>)"` if growth fails.
- `push_copy` — pushes copy of value at idx (alias for `push_value`).
- `as_bytes` — coerces stack value at idx to bytes.
- `as_bytes_or_coerce` — same, separate trait method.
- `thread_status` — wraps `lua_vm::api::status`.
- `load_buffer` — wraps `lua_vm::api::load` with one-shot reader.
- `warning` — wraps `lua_vm::api::warning`.
- `string_to_number` (by idx) — reads string at idx, parses via `lua_vm::api::string_to_number`, returns bytes consumed.
- `string_to_number_push` (by slice) — directly forwards bytes to `lua_vm::api::string_to_number`.
- `gc_count`, `gc_count_b`, `gc_step`, `gc_is_running`, `gc_control_simple` — each maps to `lua_vm::api::gc(self, GcArgs::...)` (5 funcs).

**Newly-surfaced todos noticed but NOT implemented** (different families or non-trivial):
- `set_funcs_with_upvalues`, `new_lib`, `new_lib_table`, `new_metatable`, `set_metatable_by_name`, `register_funcs`, `register_lib` — library registration family.
- `check_arg_userdata`, `test_arg_userdata`, `new_userdata_typed`, `get_iuservalue`, `set_iuservalue` — userdata family.
- `get_upvalue`, `set_upvalue`, `upvalue_id`, `join_upvalues` — upvalue family.
- `get_subtable_registry` (referenced by already-impl'd `get_or_create_registry_subtable` — latent bug).
- `set_warn_fn`, `get_info`, `get_stack`, `get_param_name`, `get_local_at`, `set_local_at`, hook getters/setters, `lua_traceback` — debug/hook family.
- `load_file`, `load_file_ex`, `load_buffer_ex`, `load_with_reader`, `dump_function` — load family (some need `std::fs`).

**Build:** `cargo build -p lua-cli` is **green** (warnings only, all pre-existing).
